    quantity: 1

---

## Notes

A small late-stage invoice for rollout support after the usable version finally landed with staff.

next_step.current_state: Both requested finance records were OCR-structured with compliant YAML frontmatter while preserving original bodies. Inbox task is complete; workflow says delete processed inbox file, and it was read earlier.
Task fully completed per workflow: processed next inbox item, applied OCR frontmatter to both requested files, and deleted inbox item.

function.message: Processed the next inbox request by running both specified finance docs through the OCR/frontmatter workflow. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to the invoice and bill records while preserving their original note bodies, then deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree/read/context), read system workflow/schema docs before task work, honored nested AGENTS.md files, used OCR workflow and finance schema, preserved original note bodies, and deleted processed inbox item per process-next-inbox-item workflow.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox file requested OCR processing of two specific finance records. Evidence from both target files provided all required fields and line items; finance schema defined required frontmatter keys and line structure; OCR workflow required extracting visible data into frontmatter and preserving body text. Both files were updated accordingly and inbox item removed as directed by the inbox processing workflow.
